title: Thiophosphate Alkyl Esters Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Thiophosphate Alkyl Esters Group
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). This screening assessment focuses on 2 substances referred to collectively as the Thiophosphate Alkyl Esters Group.
- Thiophosphate Alkyl Esters Group
- Summary of publications
Confidential Accession Numbers (CAN)
International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC) or trade name
Draft screening assessment
Risk management scope
Proposed conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Thiophosphate Alkyl Esters Group
Reaction products of 4-methyl-2-pentanol and diphosphorus pentasulfide, propoxylated, esterified with diphosphorous pentaoxide, and salted by amines, C12-14- tert-alkyl
Meets one or more of the criteria
Refer to risk management scope
Phosphorothioic acid, O,O-dibutyl ester, mixed (C8,C16,C18) alkylamine salt Footnote b
Footnote 1 This substance is a UVCB (unknown or variable composition, complex reaction products, or biological materials). Return to footnote a referrer Footnote 2 This is a trade name; the substance has IUPAC names for each of its 2 main constituents. Return to footnote b referrer

Anticipated publication of the final screening assessment and proposed risk management approach.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the Draft Screening Assessment for Thiophosphate Alkyl Esters Group (including follow-up activities for TPAE-2) and the Risk Management Scope for TPAE-1 of the Thiophosphate Alkyl Esters Group . The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 155, No. 11 .
